nasb.text: Thus you shall say to them, “The gods that did not make the heavens and the earth will perish from the earth and from under the heavens.”

esv.text: Thus shall you say to them: “The gods who did not make the heavens and the earth shall perish from the earth and from under the heavens.”

cnv.text: 你們要對他們這樣說：“那些沒有創造天地的神，必從地上、從天下消滅。”

ccb.text: 你们要这样对他们说：“那些神明没有创造天地，它们将从天下消亡。”
